name: onchain-agent
description: Anchoring & Verification capability — Phase A hashing & canonicalization library

scripts.test:mcp:e2e: forge build --root contracts && pnpm -C packages/mcp-server test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: forge build --root contracts && pnpm -C packages/anchor-e2e test
scripts.test:a2a:e2e: forge build --root contracts && pnpm -C packages/a2a-agent test:e2e
scripts.test: pnpm run test:ts && pnpm run test:sol && pnpm run test:mcp && pnpm run test:verify && pnpm run test:a2a
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run test:mcp:e2e
